title: INFECTIONS EVERYWHERE
description: Legit all the "Procedurally Generated" mods (On Modrinth) that concern infecting as much on the environment as possible.
body:
This Modpack was legit just me adding all of the infection mods that were available on one version. (That being Minecraft 1.20.1)

  There are a lot of unneccary mods that are included in the modpack, and there are some other fps-saving mods to help the experience.

  I really wanted to get the [Scape 'N Run: Parasites Mod By Dhanantry](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites), the [Withering Away Mod by Badplay3r_pl](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/withering-away-reborn) which is unfortunately is not supported by Modrinth, the [Mi Alliance: Invasion Mod By Lord_Blubee](https://modrinth.com/mod/mi-alliance-invasion), etc. but I couldn't as they didn't support the version, sadly.

  This is kind of a big modpack, so I would advise it not be played on something like a ~~School Laptop~~.

  **EDIT**
  The Modpack as of August 10th, has practically and accidentally ended up being a little bigger than what most laptops can handle so i think maybe this can run at least on a potatoe pc(desktop).

  _"I have had the unfortunate run in with the discovery that most of the more available infection mods out there are on Curseforge. Sadly, the creators of said mods do not wish to transfer their items to the notably superior modpack platform supplier(Modrinth), and therefore I must create a modpack on the other platform so that the "INFECTIONS EVERYWHERE" Modpack fits it's name correctly"_
-_Sincerely, TheBossMan August 10th 2024_

8/12/2024: I legit accidentally deleted the dev versoin of the modpack and am no longer able to edit it. However, I am able to submit the (Unexpected)final product: "INFECTIONS_EVERYWHERE_Ver_4.0.0"!

In other words, I cant work on the modpack any more lol(womp womp).

[Link to "INFECTIONS EVERYWHERE" for CurseForge.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/infections-everywhere)

**CREDITS FOR "PROCEDURALLY GENERATED INFECTION MODS"**

- [From Another World By Acats](https://modrinth.com/mod/from-another-world)
- [Dawn Of The Flood By TeamAbyssal](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-the-flood)
- [The Flesh That Hates By Winvic](https://modrinth.com/mod/tfth)
- [The Sculk Horde By Mikeatron-User](https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-horde)
- [Fungal Infection: Spore By Harbinger](https://modrinth.com/mod/fungal-infectionspore)

#   **NOTE:**
**ABSOLUTELY NONE** of the mods I used are mine, nor do I own; Therefore, all rights are reserved to their respective owners. This means that if you want to learn more about the other authors of the other mods than the ones listed above, you must actually get off your butt and do your own research about the mods included in the pack!
